TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Tomislav_Nikolić, title = Tomislav_Nikolić, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tomislav_Nikolić} }

S.FORM: = Tomislav Nikolić = Mntucing hngkawas 1952 idas 2 jiyax 15 ka Tomislav Nikolić ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Serbia ta sayang o kiya ka Tomislav Nikolić, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 5 jiyax 31 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = tomisla* nikoli* = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka tomisla* nikoli* ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan səɾbia ta sajaŋ o kija ka tomisla* nikoli*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Tomislav Nikolić = Mntucing hngkawas 1952 idas 2 jiyax 15 ka Tomislav Nikolić ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Serbia ta sayang o kiya ka Tomislav Nikolić, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 5 jiyax 31 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = tomisla* nikoli* = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka tomisla* nikoli* ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan səɾbia ta sajaŋ o kija ka tomisla* nikoli*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
